title: feat(rotation): local-operator rotation scripts for provider + infra + SOPS keys
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh locks for the hive
gist.blurb: We've upgraded our internal security with a brand new set of key rotation scripts. Keeping the hive safe and secure, one cryptographic key at a time!
gist.summary: Added self-contained, local-operator scripts for end-to-end rotation of all provider keys, infrastructure tokens, and SOPS identities.
gist.impact: This significantly strengthens our security posture by allowing secure, automated key rotations without exposing highly privileged admin credentials to CI environments.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee as a locksmith or security expert. Key rings, glowing locks, retro server racks, and a cozy hacker vibe. The robot companion could be helping hold a giant pixelated key.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, turning a glowing golden key in a chunky retro server rack. A cute robot with a CRT monitor head holds a keyring nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny tool belt, turning a glowing golden key in a chunky retro server rack.
